additional_rules.name: blocking-call-in-route-handler
additional_rules.message: Blocking call in route handler — will block the event loop and degrade server throughput
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use async alternatives: Task.sleep(nanoseconds:) for delays, async/await for I/O, or offload to a Vapor Queue for background work.

additional_rules.name: direct-db-access-in-controller
additional_rules.message: Direct database access in controller — use the repository pattern instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject a repository protocol (e.g., UserRepository) and call its methods instead of accessing req.db directly in the controller.

additional_boundaries.name: Controllers must not import Models directly
